name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Another great week for Cruz for President!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
Hello Friend,

We launched this campaign just over two weeks ago, and the response from courageous conservatives all over this country has been astonishing.

Tens of thousands of you have contributed, and tens of thousands more have signed up to volunteer with the campaign.

In addition, as Senator Cruz has toured the country, overflow crowds have showed up to hear about how, together, we can and will reignite the promise of America.

In the past week, Senator Cruz has traveled to Iowa and South Carolina where stop after stop, he was encouraged by the passion and enthusiasm in each of the supporters there.

And just this morning, Senator Cruz visited Fort Hood to attend the Purple Heart Medal Ceremony for our heroes injured or killed in the 2009 terrorist attack. You can watch his interview with Fox and Friends from this morning here <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NwEtXJT_69o>.

This afternoon, Senator Cruz traveled to Nashville, TN, to speak at the NRA's Annual Meeting, and then will continue on the campaign trail in North Carolina and New Hampshire in the coming week.

All the best,
Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President

P.S. As always, we thank you for your continued support! And if you haven't yet, please click here to sign up as a volunteer with our campaign <http://www.tedcruz.org/volunteer/>!
